---
title: "Crudo Castigo: El Veredicto de la Sangre Negra"
subtitle: "Aprendizaje Práctico Experimental (APE) - Unidad 1"
author: "Grupo 3 - Séptimo A"
date: "2026-05-03"
bibliography: references.bib
cls: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    mainfont: "Arial"
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    header-includes:
      - \usepackage{setspace}
      - \setstretch{1.5}
      - \usepackage{indentfirst}
      - \setlength{\parindent}{1.27cm}
      - \usepackage{xcolor}
      - \renewcommand{\contentsname}{Índice}
      - \renewcommand{\figurename}{Figura}
      - \renewcommand{\tablename}{Tabla}
  docx:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: github
---

\vspace{-4em}

{{< include chapters/03-guion.qmd >}}


\newpage
# Referencias Bibliográficas

::: {#refs}
:::
